sessions.title: Session 1: What is Language?
indicators: Explain why language is unique to humans
sessions.content:
Language is a system of communication used by humans.

It is arbitrary, productive, and culturally transmitted.

sessions.title: Session 2: Properties of Language
sessions.content:
Key properties: arbitrariness, displacement, discreteness, and creativity.

  • Arbitrariness: no natural link between word and meaning.
  • Displacement: talk about past/future.

sessions.title: Session 1: Stages of Literacy
indicators: Identify the five foundations of reading
sessions.content: The five foundations are: Phonemic awareness, Phonics, Vocabulary, Fluency, and Comprehension.
